name: Brigitte's Red Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the cabbage finely.
2. Fry the bacon until crisp.
3. Sauté the chopped onion in the bacon grease.
4. Add the shredded cabbage and peeled, cubed apple to the pan with bacon grease.
5. Crumble the bacon into the mixture.
6. Pour water into the pan until the cabbage is well covered.
7. Cook over low heat until the cabbage becomes soft.
8. Season the dish with vinegar and sugar according to taste.
9. Add salt to taste.
10. Note that this dish can be reheated multiple times, and it will improve each time it is warmed up.
